text: I feel as though I am entering a modern temple of knowledge, its glass walls and vivid neon inviting both curiosity and caution. There’s a sterility to the air, tidy and ordered, that makes me keenly aware of my physical presence yet paradoxically distant. Once inside, the bold, playful colors and the wall labeled "R+D" spark an intellectual awakening; here is a celebration of research, innovation, and the interplay between humanity and technology. But the immersive visuals and glowing screens, so carefully arranged, also highlight my own transience—a visitor passing through someone else’s ongoing experiment in progress. I am open, reflective, eager, and ever so slightly displaced, as though pausing on the threshold between the known and the uncertain.
